Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0830 "ARAC-6000-0830" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $6000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "ARAC (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $6000 which copies 512 bytes of data from $6020 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $0830 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
Note: the space taken by the init routine and data at $6000 overwrites the first part of the loading screen bitmap, which is still present in memory after the loading has finished.
